socialProof.title: Join 600+ founders and builders already on the waitlist

whatYouGet.label: What you get
whatYouGet.headline: Not a mockup. A real app.

realCode.title: Real React Native Code
realCode.desc: Not drag-and-drop output. Every app is a real Expo project — inspect it, edit it, hand it to a developer, own it forever.

phoneTest.title: Test on Your Actual Phone
phoneTest.desc: Scan a QR code. Your app is live on your device with real performance, real haptics, real everything. Not a simulator.

appStore.title: Publish to App Store & Google Play
appStore.desc: Hit one button. AppX handles the build, signing, and submission through EAS. Your app goes live — without Xcode or Android Studio.

features.label: Features
features.headline: Everything you need to prototype and ship
features.subheadline: From first idea to App Store — we've got you covered

multiScreen.title: Multi-Screen Generation
multiScreen.desc: Describe an entire app. Get a complete project with navigation, state management, and data flow — not just a single screen.

livePreview.title: Live Device Preview
livePreview.desc: Scan a QR code. Test on your phone in seconds. Real device, real performance, real haptics.

chatDriven.title: Chat-Driven Iteration
chatDriven.desc: Refine any screen conversationally. Change layouts, colors, logic — like pair-programming with a senior engineer.

publish.title: App Store Submission
publish.desc: When your app is ready, our team handles the entire App Store and Google Play submission process for you. One-time fee, zero hassle.

realCode.title: Real Code You Own
realCode.desc: Every project is a real Expo/React Native codebase. Export to GitHub, hand off to a dev team. No lock-in. Ever.

gemini.title: Powered by Gemini 2.5 Pro
gemini.desc: Zolt uses Google's most capable coding model to plan, write, and validate your app's code — so what you get actually works.

describe.desc: Write your idea in plain English. As much or as little detail as you want.

generate.desc: AI plans your screens, writes navigation logic, and generates real React Native code — live.

preview.desc: Scan a QR code with Expo Go. Your app is on your phone in under 30 seconds.

refine.desc: "Change the color to navy." Every change is applied instantly and pushed to your phone.

ship.desc: One click to deploy. One build to submit to App Store and Google Play. You're live.

useCases.label: Who it's for
useCases.headline: Built for anyone with an app idea

founders.title: Entrepreneurs & Founders
founders.desc: Validate your idea before spending $50K on a dev team. Build an MVP, test with real users, raise funding with a working product.

designers.title: Designers
designers.desc: Your Figma mockups deserve to be real apps. Turn designs into interactive, shippable products without writing code.

developers.title: Developers
developers.desc: Skip the boilerplate. Scaffold a full multi-screen app in 2 minutes, then customize the real React Native code.

startups.title: Startups & Agencies
startups.desc: Ship MVPs in days. Prototype for clients in hours. Multiply your output without multiplying headcount.

students.title: Students & Side Projects
students.desc: That app idea you've had for two years? Build it this weekend. For free.

pricing.title: Start free, scale when ready
pricing.subtitle: Build your prototype for free. Pay only when you need more power or want to ship to the App Store.

items.a: No. But if you can code, you'll love the real code output. Every project is a standard Expo/React Native codebase you can open in any IDE.
Yes. Expo + React Native — the same stack used by companies like Shopify, Discord, and thousands of startups. StyleSheet.create, proper navigation, real state management.

items.q: Can I edit the code myself?
items.a: Absolutely. Export to GitHub, open in VS Code or any IDE. It's your code — no lock-in, no proprietary format.

items.q: What if the AI gets it wrong?
items.a: Just tell it. Every change is conversational. Say "make the button bigger" or "add a settings screen" and it updates instantly. You can also edit the code directly.

items.q: How does App Store submission work?
items.a: When your app is ready, request a submission through Zolt. Our team reviews your app, handles the build, signing, screenshots, and submission to Apple and Google — for a one-time fee based on your app's complexity.

items.q: Will my app work on Android too?
items.a: Yes. React Native runs on both iOS and Android from the same codebase. Build once, ship everywhere.

items.q: What can I build with this?
items.a: Anything from a simple habit tracker to a multi-screen marketplace with user auth, data storage, and real-time features. If React Native can do it, Zolt can prototype it.

cta.headline: Your app idea deserves to exist.
cta.desc: Join 600+ builders who are turning ideas into real, working mobile apps with Zolt. Free to start — no credit card, no code, no waiting.

footer.tagline: From idea to App Store. We handle everything in between.
